data.body:
Epic 5ca8 (codebase-health remediation 2026-06-27) — session checkpoint + resume guide

STATUS: paused at a clean milestone (user chose pause/fresh-session). The plan-review GATE is now functional; 3 of 11 children landed; 2 gate bugs (surfaced while driving the epic) fixed end-to-end; 1 follow-up story queued.

LANDED (merged to origin/main + tickets closed+signed unless noted):
- GATE FIX #1 (#71, bug `no_repo_root` — NOT an epic child): centralized code-read-root resolution `rebar.llm.config.resolve_code_root` (explicit > cfg.repo_path > active attested snapshot > live checkout; `allow_checkout_fallback=False` for assemble_context). Fixed det-floor P2 abstaining `no_repo_root`. Bug ticket closed.
- GATE FIX #2 (#74, bug `bogus-spray-scat` 2f18-9294-7be8-4eff): the Anthropic PROMPTED structured path (`_pai_structured`) never conveyed the output JSON schema to the model → verifier emitted divergent keys (`findings`/`attributes`/`sub_answers`) → tolerant-parse → empty `verifications` → every finding `no-verification` → INDETERMINATE. Fix: `structured.schema_directive(model_cls)` appended to the prompted prompt (+retry). Bug ticket closed. THIS is what unblocked the epic (children now reach PASS).
- dazed-daisy-bur (#72, 0ef9): split prompts.py front-matter cluster → prompts_frontmatter.py; off the module-size allowlist. CLOSED.
- war-bed-plunk (#73, 45d0): doc/comment accuracy fixes. CLOSED.
- clay-cake-act (#75, a42b): library `rebar.transition(force_close=...)` parity + parity test. CLOSED.
- rancid-vane-wreak (#76, 9d34): run-scoped `assemble_context` memo (graph assembled once/run; verdict bytes preserved). CLOSED (close in progress at log time).

FOLLOW-UP QUEUED (user-requested, discovered_from the verify bug):
- `drag-gripe-brake` (91e7-7159-8af1-4d4d), story: enforceable/testable contracts at LLM-workflow stage seams (kill the silent-degrade class; replace grep/glob self-checks). AUTHORIZED to research actively-maintained OSS for patterns. OPEN/unclaimed.

REMAINING EPIC CHILDREN (6, OPEN/unclaimed, gate now works so plan-reviews PASS cleanly):
- romp-swath-wince (ff7d, story): unify reconciler exception taxonomy (ReconcilerError base + RetryExhaustedError(ReconcilerError, RuntimeError)). PLAN-REVIEW ALREADY PASSED + SIGNED this session (claimable immediately). PRECEDES self-waltz-ace (both touch applier.py).
- veiny-trout-brink (586c, task): honor caller's explicit LLMConfig in workflow gate ops. AFTER rancid (done) — touches workflow_ops.py.
- tarry-creep-range (c38b, task): consolidate the two prompt-authoring write backends to one atomic writer.
- self-waltz-ace (da53, story): split applier.py dispatch table from per-action handlers. AFTER romp (exception type).
- unfed-liner-arson (1242, story): split outbound_differ.py at the comment-diff seam.
- hush-quail-holm (1dfc, story): decompose reconcile_once() into in-place phase helpers.
- foamy-gem-skip (2220, story): close F1/F2/F3 E2E config-matrix test gaps.

RESUME RECIPE (per child):
1. Be in this worktree on a fresh branch off origin/main (now has both gate fixes — the editable install needs them for the gates to work). `make install` already done; venv at .venv.
2. `rebar review-plan <id>` (PASS now that the gate is fixed; remediate any real advisories). `rebar claim <id> --assignee <you>`.
3. Implement (subagents work well for the file-splits). `make check` + targeted tests.
4. Commit, push, PR, `gh pr merge --auto --squash`. CI is slow (~10min, macOS pytest); a flaky git-HEAD test occasionally needs `gh run rerun <id> --failed`.
5. After the PR merges, checkout latest origin/main (so the working tree has the child's code) and `rebar transition <id> in_progress closed` (completion verifier — needs the child's code present; bugs need `--reason="Fixed: ..."`).
6. File-conflict orderings: romp BEFORE self-waltz (applier.py); rancid (done) BEFORE veiny (workflow_ops.py).

GOTCHA LEARNED: the completion/plan-review gates read the WORKING TREE via the editable install — to close a ticket the working tree must contain that child's merged code (checkout latest origin/main first), and must contain BOTH gate fixes (now on main).
